/usr/bin/ar qc liblhm_models.a CMakeFiles/lhm_models.dir/lhm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lhm_models.dir/lhm_adapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lhm_models.dir/lhm_arch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lhm_models.dir/lhm_batch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lhm_models.dir/lhm_chat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lhm_models.dir/lhm_context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lhm_models.dir/lhm_grammar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lhm_models.dir/lhm_graph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lhm_models.dir/lhm_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lhm_models.dir/lhm_io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lhm_models.dir/lhm_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lhm_models.dir/lhm_quant.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lhm_models.dir/lhm_sampler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lhm_models.dir/lhm_vocab.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lhm_models.dir/unicode_data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lhm_models.dir/unicode.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblhm_models.a
